headline: Is Airbnb, Inc. (ABNB) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is ABNB a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Airbnb, Inc. on Phaetrix Investing’s Substack by Phaetrix. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on ABNB. Airbnb, Inc.’s share was trading at $143.59 as of April 20th. ABNB’s trailing and forward P/E were 35.12 and 27.40 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Airbnb, Inc., together […]
